details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. All other expected top-level directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) and reports/audit/ are present.

reports/board/ directory missing. memory_bank/ has key docs (report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md, systemPatterns.md, TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README and specs. reports/audit/ exists.

Deprecated directories still present: moltbot/ (contains sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py), board/ (contains eod/ operational outputs and stock_quant_officer_contract.md).

Moltbot code/config found outside docs/audit exclusion zone. Active code: moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/board.py. Scripts: scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py. Board operational data: board/eod/out/ contains cron_diagnosis.json and eod_failure.json files.
